clusters.justification: These terms map onto the salience and autonomic-limbic cortices, representing the overarching processing of emotional valence, physiological arousal, and interoceptive threat.
Anchoring to the mesolimbic-striatal dopamine system and ventromedial prefrontal cortex, this domain encompasses reward processing, incentive salience, and cost-benefit decision-making.

Mapping largely to the default mode network, these terms reflect the internally-directed cognitive architectures required for constructing self-referential narratives, theory of mind, and interpersonal representations.
